rationale: High-energy, quantum computing-inspired futuristic developer/researcher portfolio with deep space navy and cyan/violet neon accents.

navbar.style: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 backdrop-blur-md bg-[#050A18]/70 border-b border-white/10

achievement_card.style: relative overflow-hidden rounded-xl bg-white/[0.02] border border-white/10 p-8
achievement_card.glow_effect: absolute inset-0 bg-gradient-to-br from-cyan-500/10 to-violet-500/10 opacity-0 hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity
achievement_card.count_up: text-4xl font-bold font-heading text-transparent bg-clip-text bg-gradient-to-r from-cyan-400 to-violet-400

skill_chip.style: px-4 py-2 rounded-full border border-white/10 bg-white/[0.03] text-sm text-slate-300 hover:bg-cyan-500/10 hover:border-cyan-500/30 hover:text-cyan-300 transition-all cursor-default

project_card.style: group relative overflow-hidden rounded-2xl glassmorphism cursor-pointer

modal_specs.content: relative top-1/2 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 w-[90vw] max-w-3xl max-h-[85vh] overflow-y-auto bg-[#0A1128] border border-white/10 rounded-2xl p-8 shadow-[0_0_40px_rgba(0,229,255,0.1)]

research_card.style: w-full rounded-2xl border border-white/10 bg-[#0A1128] p-8 md:p-10 relative overflow-hidden
research_card.stat_badges: inline-flex items-center gap-2 px-3 py-1 rounded-md bg-white/5 border border-white/10 text-xs text-slate-300 font-mono
research_card.title: text-2xl md:text-3xl font-heading text-white mb-4

contact.icon_link: p-4 rounded-full bg-white/[0.03] border border-white/10 text-slate-300 hover:text-cyan-400 hover:bg-cyan-400/10 hover:border-cyan-400/30 transition-all hover:-translate-y-1
contact.cv_button: px-8 py-4 rounded-full bg-cyan-500 hover:bg-cyan-400 text-[#050A18] font-bold font-mono transition-colors shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(0,229,255,0.4)]

quantum_circuit.gate_style: border border-cyan-500/50 bg-[#050A18] text-cyan-500 text-xs font-mono px-2 py-1
quantum_circuit.pulse_animation: linear moving dot/glow from left to right along wires

icons.usage: Use standard imports from lucide-react. Ensure strokeWidth=1.5 for a sleeker, tech feel.

project_thumbnails.description: Abstract quantum hallway with blue/white lights

instructions_to_main_agent: Install required dependencies: framer-motion, lucide-react, react-countup (for achievements).
Do NOT use Space Grotesk for Body text; restrict to JetBrains Mono for Body/Accents.
Ensure `data-testid` is added to all buttons, links, and form inputs for testing.
Implement the Quantum Circuit as a lightweight Canvas or absolute positioning CSS divs in the Hero section.
Implement drifing orbs as fixed/absolute divs with heavy blur and translate animations behind the main layout.
